steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The previous sentence introduces “Multitask learning” as a singular noun. The blank must contain a pronoun that refers to this singular antecedent.

steps.title: Apply pronoun agreement
steps.content:
A pronoun must agree with its antecedent in number. “It” is the singular pronoun that refers to the singular antecedent “Multitask learning.” Those, They, and Some are all plural pronouns that would disagree with the singular antecedent.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
